description_long: This object is a vintage-style gas pump, featuring a tall rectangular metal body painted in a pale blue color. At the top, there is a prominent white globe with the red Conoco logo, which serves as both branding and a decorative element. The front face displays a classic analog meter with dials for gallons and price per gallon, as well as a Conoco logo plate below. A black fuel hose with a metallic nozzle is attached to the side, coiled neatly and ready for use. The pump is accompanied by a single black tire with a red inner ring, placed on the ground nearby. The overall design is reminiscent of mid-20th-century American gas stations, with a sturdy, utilitarian build and clear branding.
description: A vintage Conoco gas pump with a pale blue metal body, white globe logo, analog meter, and attached black fuel hose, accompanied by a single black tire.
description_view_0: The side view shows the pale blue rectangular body, the white Conoco globe on top, and the black tire in the foreground.
description_view_1: The front view highlights the analog meter, Conoco logo plate, and the fuel hose attached to the right side.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the back of the pump with the hose and nozzle hanging, and the tire partially visible behind.
description_view_3: The opposite side view shows the plain side of the pump, the Conoco globe, and the tire positioned to the rear.
attribute_fuel_pumps: One vintage-style fuel pump is present, with a pale blue rectangular body, a white globe on top displaying the Conoco logo, and a single black hose with a metallic nozzle attached to the side. The front features an analog meter and a Conoco logo plate.
attribute_station_signage: A prominent white globe with the red Conoco logo is mounted on top of the pump, and a smaller Conoco logo plate is affixed to the front below the meter. No other signage is visible.
attribute_price_display_board: A small analog price and gallons display is integrated into the front of the pump, showing price per gallon and total gallons, but no separate price display board is visible.
